title: sideritis incana subsp. atlantica
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. atlantica, also known as the mountain tea or rocky mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis incana plant, a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. atlantica include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy among locals. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
